stub: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
personalization: He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents.
substantive: He supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I always listen to voters’ views, because at the end of the day they get to choose whether to reelect me or not.”
text: He is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. He is from your constituency. He tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of his party, even when that conflicts with the wishes of his constituents. He supports adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, he regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, he said: “I always listen to voters’ views, because at the end of the day they get to choose whether to reelect me or not.”
